parameters.content:
## Local Echo Memory Orchestrator

Webhook actions:
- `manifest`
- `retrieve`
- `ingest`

Backend memory API for Open WebUI / tools, not the main chat UI.

Expected payload keys:
- `action`
- `agent` (`echo` or `skippy`)
- `session_id`
- `query` for retrieve
- `messages` for ingest
- optional `source_type`, `source_path`, `tags`

Map credentials after import:
- PostgreSQL
- Qdrant
- Ollama

## Langfuse

This workflow avoids a hard dependency on the Langfuse community node so it imports cleanly.

Use Langfuse first for prompt management, then add tracing from custom services or Open WebUI pipelines later.

parameters.query: SELECT fact_id, fact_type, subject, predicate, object_text, confidence, updated_at FROM memory_facts WHERE memory_namespace = '{{ $json.memory_namespace }}' AND status = 'approved' ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 25;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { query: $('Embed Query').item.json.embeddings?.[0] || $('Embed Query').item.json.embedding || [], limit: 8, with_payload: true } }}

={ { model: $env.OLLAMA_SUMMARY_MODEL || 'gpt-oss:20b', temperature: 0, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "You are a memory extraction service for a local agent system.
Return strict JSON with this schema:
{
  "title": string,
  "summary_short": string,
  "summary_long": string,
  "facts": [{"fact_type": string, "subject": string, "predicate": string, "object_text": string, "confidence": number}],
  "events": [{"event_type": string, "title": string, "event_text": string}],
  "tasks": [{"title": string, "status": string}],
  "tags": [string]
}
Only include durable facts that are useful later." }, { role: 'user', content: $json.transcript_text } ] } }

parameters.query: INSERT INTO sessions (session_id, agent_id, user_id, channel, source_app, started_at, ended_at, title, summary_short, summary_long, tags_json) VALUES ('{{ $json.session_id }}','{{ $json.agent }}','{{ $json.user_id }}','api','openwebui',NOW(),NOW(),'{{ ($json.extracted.title || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','{{ ($json.extracted.summary_short || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','{{ ($json.extracted.summary_long || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','{{ JSON.stringify($json.extracted.tags || []) }}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (session_id) DO UPDATE SET ended_at = NOW(), title = EXCLUDED.title, summary_short = EXCLUDED.summary_short, summary_long = EXCLUDED.summary_long, tags_json = EXCLUDED.tags_json;

INSERT INTO memory_review_queue (agent_id, session_id, candidate_type, payload_json, confidence, status, created_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.agent }}','{{ $json.session_id }}','session_extract','{{ JSON.stringify($json.extracted).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,0.75,'pending',NOW());

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { points: [ { id: $json.session_id, vector: $('Embed Summary').item.json.embeddings?.[0] || $('Embed Summary').item.json.embedding || [], payload: { agent: $json.agent, source_type: $json.source_type, source_path: $json.source_path, session_id: $json.session_id, doc_title: $json.extracted.title || 'session_summary', chunk_index: 0, tags: $json.extracted.tags || [], namespace: $json.memory_namespace, created_at: new Date().toISOString(), text: $json.extracted.summary_long || $json.transcript_text } } ] } }}

meta.notes: Map credentials and environment variables after import. Start by testing action=manifest.
